narrative: Iran missile development and Trump-Xi diplomacy headlines introduce a geopolitical risk premium as WTI crude retreats -3.64%; gold higher +0.74% near $4,567; equities +0.81%; DXY +0.12%; VIX 17.4. USD/JPY firms to 157.87 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite regional oil shocks. UK 30-year gilts hitting 5.78% highlights fiscal pressure, though GBP/USD holds 1.3541 on neutral 0bp carry. Watch the RBNZ meeting on May 27 for the next major G10 policy shift.
